description:
Start a safer internet journey with IPVanish VPN. Fast speeds, verified no-traffic-logs, and apps for all devices.

IPVanish is a top-rated VPN provider. A VPN, short for Virtual Private Network, offers increased cybersecurity by encrypting online traffic and shielding IP addresses. With IPVanish, you can use the internet more anonymously and help protect your data from being tracked by third parties.
What's New:
- Threat Protection Pro was added for Advanced Plan users. This service blocks ads and trackers, prevents access to fraudulent websites, scans webpages and downloads for harmful content, and blocks malicious network activity — even when the VPN is not connected.
- We integrated RAM-only servers, which can now be easily found using a new filter in the Locations table.
- Performance enhancements were made, including faster connection times and important stability improvements.
With every release, we make improvements under the hood and squash any bugs that come up. Having issues? Contact us at support@ipvanish.com and we'll help find a fix.
